chatamari.note: Standard serving with meat/egg toppings. High carb rice base.

chhoila.note: Grilled spicy meat (Buff/Chicken). Excellent lean protein source.

dalbhat.note: Full thali estimation: Rice (350kcal) + Dal (150kcal) + Tarkari (100kcal).

dhindo.note: Millet/Buckwheat mash. Low fat, high complex carbohydrates.

gundruk.note: Fermented leafy greens. Probiotic-rich and very low calorie.

kheer.note: Rice pudding. High sugar/carb content; treat as dessert.

momo.note: Standard plate (10 pcs). Steamed is healthier than fried.

sekuwa.note: Roasted meat skewers. High protein but contains visible fats.

selroti.note: Traditional rice doughnut (2 pieces). Energy-dense from frying.
